name: create_calculated_column
description: Create a new calculated column in the report using a custom expression and define its output type.

requiredFields.name: columnName
requiredFields.label: Column Name
requiredFields.description: The name of the new column to be added to the report.

requiredFields.name: outputType
requiredFields.label: Output Type
requiredFields.description: The data type of the result produced by the expression.

confirmationMessage: You are about to create a new calculated column named '{{columnName}}' using the expression: {{expression}}.
successMessage: Successfully created the calculated column '{{columnName}}' and added it to your report.

name: validate_expression_syntax
description: Validate the syntax of an expression to ensure balanced parentheses, correct function usage, and proper data casting.

requiredFields.name: expression
requiredFields.label: Expression to Validate
requiredFields.description: The expression logic to check for errors.

confirmationMessage: You are about to validate the syntax for: {{expression}}.
successMessage: Successfully validated the expression. No syntax errors were found and parentheses are balanced.

name: add_tenure_calculation
description: Add a tenure calculation column that determines the years or days of service between two date fields.

requiredFields.name: columnName
requiredFields.label: Tenure Column Name
requiredFields.description: Label for the new tenure column.

requiredFields.name: hireDateField
requiredFields.label: Hire Date Field
requiredFields.description: The report column containing the start date.

requiredFields.name: unit
requiredFields.label: Calculation Unit
requiredFields.description: The time unit for the tenure result.

confirmationMessage: You are about to calculate tenure in {{unit}} based on the field {{hireDateField}}.
successMessage: Successfully added tenure calculation column '{{columnName}}' to the report.

name: update_salary_logic
description: Update an existing salary-related expression, such as total compensation or bonus calculations.

requiredFields.name: columnName
requiredFields.label: Existing Column Name
requiredFields.description: The name of the column you want to update.

requiredFields.name: newExpression
requiredFields.label: New Expression
requiredFields.description: The updated math expression using Add(), Multiply(), or value() casting.

confirmationMessage: You are about to update the logic for '{{columnName}}' with the new expression: {{newExpression}}.
successMessage: Successfully updated the salary calculation for '{{columnName}}'.

name: format_text_concatenation
description: Combine multiple text columns and static text into a single formatted column.

requiredFields.name: columnName
requiredFields.label: New Label Column
requiredFields.description: The name for the concatenated text column.

requiredFields.name: expression
requiredFields.label: Concat Expression
requiredFields.description: The Concat() function combining fields (e.g., Concat(FirstName, ' ', LastName)).

confirmationMessage: You are about to create a combined text column using the following logic: {{expression}}.

name: remove_calculated_column
description: Remove a custom calculated column from the report.

requiredFields.name: columnName
requiredFields.label: Column to Remove
requiredFields.description: The name of the calculated column to delete.

confirmationMessage: You are about to permanently remove the calculated column '{{columnName}}' from this report.
successMessage: Successfully removed '{{columnName}}' from the report definition.
